title: Dotzip
description: Shared code between all of Capozi's mods
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c93a3093708f63f9ccbfc507b8bf47f698325f01.png) This is a simple library mod for shared code between capozi's mods, as well as various registry utilities used in my mods. # !Warning! Because of the changes made in update 1.2.3.0a, older versions of my mods will not work with this version or beyond. If you wish to use any of the versions listed below, please use 1.2.2.2a - Menagerie 0.6.4b - Maisonnette 0.2.4a - Demise 0.8.1b
For Mod Devs If for some inconcieveable reason you want to use my library, there is a wiki on github listed here.
